description: Unit: equals operator matches case-insensitively on subject
Unit: contains operator matches substring case-insensitively
Unit: starts_with and ends_with operators match case-insensitively
Unit: ALL-of semantics — rule with two conditions does not match when one fails
Unit: from_domain field derives domain from sender address
Unit: to_address condition matches when any recipient (to/cc) matches
Unit: body_text input is sliced to the cap before condition evaluation
Unit: matches_regex evaluates a valid pattern case-insensitively
Unit: invalid regex pattern evaluates the condition as false without throwing
Unit: regex pattern exceeding the length cap is rejected as non-matching
Unit: between extraction pulls text inside delimiters from subject
Unit: between extraction with missing end delimiter is a non-match
Unit: between extraction occurrence=first vs occurrence=last with repeated delimiters
Unit: after extraction returns text following the marker to end of line/value
Unit: before extraction returns text preceding the marker
Unit: regex extraction returns capture group 1
Unit: regex extraction with no capture group in pattern is a non-match
Unit: friendly templates and equivalent raw regex produce identical extraction results (single code path)
Unit: normalization trims, collapses internal whitespace, lowercases
Unit: extraction yielding empty/whitespace-only value is a non-match
Unit: extraction handles unicode client names (accents, non-latin)
Unit: client matcher resolves normalized client_name match
Unit: client matcher excludes inactive clients
Unit: client matcher falls back to alias lookup when name match fails
Unit: client name match takes precedence over alias when both would resolve
DB: client_name_aliases unique index rejects duplicate (tenant, lower(alias))
Unit: rules evaluated in position order
Unit: rule with provider_ids=NULL applies to all providers
Unit: rule scoped to another provider is not evaluated
Unit: inactive rule is not evaluated
Unit: first matching rule wins — later matching rules are not executed
Unit: on_no_match=proceed continues to the next matching rule (regex rule fails, later AI/catch-all rule evaluates)
Unit: proceed with no later matching rule falls through to normal pipeline outcome
Unit: on_no_match=skip stops evaluation and skips the email
Unit: on_no_match=fallback_destination resolves the fallback defaults set
Unit: evaluator exception (malformed conditions JSONB) logs warning and returns no-rules outcome
Integration: skip rule — no ticket or comment created; email_processed_messages row has processing_status='skipped' with ruleId/ruleName metadata
Integration: skip rule — attachments are not uploaded or linked
Integration: skip rule works for a tenant with no inbound_ticket_defaults configured
Integration: Huntress scenario — from @huntress.com with subject 'Alert (Acme Corp)' creates ticket assigned to Acme Corp
Integration: rule-assigned client wins when sender email exactly matches a contact of a different client
Integration: rule-assigned client wins over sender-domain match to a different client
Integration: contact attribution uses sender contact when it belongs to the assigned client
Integration: contact attribution falls back to assigned client's primary contact
Integration: assigned client's own inbound_ticket_defaults_id override applies to the created ticket
Integration: set_destination applies the referenced defaults set above contact/client overrides
Integration: set_destination still attributes client/contact via normal sender matching
Integration: extraction non-match with fallback_destination creates the ticket at the fallback destination
Integration: tenant with zero rules — pipeline outcome identical to pre-feature behavior (regression)
Integration: reply threading onto an existing ticket bypasses rules — a matching skip rule does not suppress the comment
Integration: created ticket email_metadata contains appliedRuleId and clientMatchSource='rule_extraction'
Integration: INBOUND_EMAIL_RECEIVED activity log row includes the rule name
Integration: structured evaluation log line emitted with rules considered, matched rule, outcome
Integration: deleted fallback defaults set degrades to proceed with warning (no crash, no drop)
Integration: alias pointing at a deleted/inactive client is a non-match
DB: email_processed_messages accepts processing_status='skipped' after constraint migration
Unit: OSS AI stub returns no_decision and the rule routes to on_no_match
EE: AI skip decision suppresses ticket when 'skip' is in allowed_outcomes
EE: AI decision outside allowed_outcomes is treated as no_decision
EE: AI assign_client resolves extracted_client_name via the exact+alias matcher
EE: AI extracted_client_name with no client/alias match routes to on_no_match
EE: AI timeout/error treated as non-match; ticket creation proceeds via on_no_match
EE: malformed AI JSON response treated as no_decision
EE: AI prompt contains instruction and email excerpt but no tenant client list
EE: AI token usage recorded via existing usage tracking
Action: create rule rejects unknown condition field or operator
Action: create rule rejects action_config not matching action_type (e.g. extraction config on a skip rule)
Action: create rule rejects fallback_destination without fallback_inbound_ticket_defaults_id
Action: create rule rejects over-length regex pattern
Action: update rule persists changes and re-validates payload
Action: delete rule removes it from evaluation
Action: reorder persists new positions and evaluation respects them
Action: list rules returns tenant's rules only (tenant isolation)
Action: rule CRUD rejected without email-admin permission
Action: alias CRUD rejected without email-admin permission
Action: test-rule returns per-condition pass/fail, extracted value, resolved client, and final outcome for a draft rule
Action: test-rule persists nothing (no rule row, no processed-message row, no ticket)
Action: alias create surfaces a friendly error on duplicate alias
UI: Inbound Rules section renders in email settings for an authorized admin
UI: create a Huntress-style rule end-to-end through the builder and see it in the list
UI: add and remove condition rows; matches-regex selectable as an operator
UI: AI action disabled with upsell hint when add-on inactive; enabled when EE + AI add-on active
UI: drag-to-reorder persists and survives reload
UI: active toggle flips rule state from the list row
UI: rule summary text reflects conditions and action
UI: mailbox filter chips shown for provider-scoped rules
UI: non-match select shows fallback destination picker only for fallback_destination
UI: server validation errors render inline in the editor
UI: tester shows per-condition pass/fail for a sample email
UI: tester shows extracted value and resolved client for a matching sample
UI: tester alias quick-add creates the alias and re-test resolves the client
UI: client record aliases section lists, adds, and removes aliases
UI: AI config inputs (instruction, allowed outcomes) persist through save and reopen
Smoke: end-to-end via dev mail tooling — send Huntress-style email, verify ticket client assignment; send status-update email, verify skip
